title: Bountiful Masonry
description: Do you have way too much of the wrong kinds of stone?  Trade them in for other stones with Mason bounties.  Bountiful / Vanilla, in 1.20.x
body:
Masonry Decree Objectives: 
- Cobblestone (and anything tagged #cobblestone)
- Stone (and anything tagged #stone, like andesite or granite)

Masonry Decree Rewards: Scaffolding, Mud Bricks, Andesite, Diorite, Granite, Stone, Smooth Stone, Deepslate, Basalt, Tuff, Calcite, and Polished / Brick block variants.
